    49		// stopCh for select{} in goroutines (runDedupCleaner), stopCtx for HTTP client cancellation.
    50		stopCh  chan struct{}
    51		stopCtx context.Context
    52		stopFn  context.CancelFunc
    53	}
    54	
    55	// New creates a Facebook channel from parsed credentials and config.
    56	func New(cfg facebookInstanceConfig, creds facebookCreds,
    57		msgBus *bus.MessageBus, _ store.PairingStore) (*Channel, error) {
    58	
    59		if creds.PageAccessToken == "" {
    60			return nil, fmt.Errorf("facebook: page_access_token is required")
    61		}
    62		if cfg.PageID == "" {
    63			return nil, fmt.Errorf("facebook: page_id is required")
    64		}
    65		if creds.AppSecret == "" {
    66			return nil, fmt.Errorf("facebook: app_secret is required")
    67		}
    68		if creds.VerifyToken == "" {
    69			return nil, fmt.Errorf("facebook: verify_token is required")
    70		}
    71	
    72		base := channels.NewBaseChannel(channels.TypeFacebook, msgBus, cfg.AllowFrom)
    73	
    74		graphClient := NewGraphClient(creds.PageAccessToken, cfg.PageID)
    75		postFetcher := NewPostFetcher(graphClient, cfg.PostContextCacheTTL)
    76	
    77		stopCtx, stopFn := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
    78	
    79		ch := &Channel{
    80			BaseChannel: base,
    81			config:      cfg,
    82			graphClient: graphClient,
    83			pageID:      cfg.PageID,
    84			postFetcher: postFetcher,
    85			stopCh:      make(chan struct{}),
    86			stopCtx:     stopCtx,
    87			stopFn:      stopFn,
    88		}
    89	
    90		wh := NewWebhookHandler(creds.AppSecret, creds.VerifyToken)
    91		wh.onComment = ch.handleCommentEvent
    92		wh.onMessage = ch.handleMessagingEvent
    93		ch.webhookH = wh
    94	
    95		return ch, nil
    96	}
    97	
    98	// Factory creates a Facebook Channel from DB instance data.
    99	// Implements channels.ChannelFactory.
   100	func Factory(name string, creds json.RawMessage, cfg json.RawMessage,
   101		msgBus *bus.MessageBus, pairingSvc store.PairingStore) (channels.Channel, error) {
   102	
   103		var c facebookCreds
   104		if err := json.Unmarshal(creds, &c); err != nil {
   105			return nil, fmt.Errorf("facebook: decode credentials: %w", err)
   106		}
   107	
   108		var ic facebookInstanceConfig
   109		if len(cfg) > 0 {
   110			if err := json.Unmarshal(cfg, &ic); err != nil {
   111				return nil, fmt.Errorf("facebook: decode config: %w", err)
   112			}
   113		}
   114	
   115		ch, err := New(ic, c, msgBus, pairingSvc)
   116		if err != nil {
   117			return nil, err
   118		}
   119		ch.SetName(name)
   120		return ch, nil
   121	}
   122	
   123	// Start connects the channel: verifies the page token, subscribes webhooks, marks healthy.
   124	func (ch *Channel) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
   125		ch.MarkStarting("connecting to Facebook page")
   126	
   127		if err := ch.graphClient.VerifyToken(ctx); err != nil {
   128			ch.MarkFailed("token invalid", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindAuth, false)
   129			return err
   130		}
   131	
   132		// Best-effort: subscribe app to webhooks.
   133		if err := ch.graphClient.SubscribeApp(ctx); err != nil {
   134			slog.Warn("facebook: webhook subscription failed (check app install on page)", "err", err)
   135		}
   136	
   137		globalRouter.register(ch)
   138		ch.MarkHealthy("connected to page " + ch.pageID)
   139		ch.SetRunning(true)
   140	
   141		// Background goroutine: evict stale dedup entries to prevent memory growth.
   142		go ch.runDedupCleaner()
   143	
   144		slog.Info("facebook channel started", "page_id", ch.pageID, "name", ch.Name())
   145		return nil
   146	}
   147	
   148	// Stop gracefully shuts down the channel.
   149	func (ch *Channel) Stop(_ context.Context) error {
   150		globalRouter.unregister(ch.pageID)
   151		ch.stopFn()           // cancel stopCtx → cancels inflight Graph API calls
   152		close(ch.stopCh)      // stop background goroutines
   153		ch.SetRunning(false)
   154		ch.MarkStopped("stopped")
   155		slog.Info("facebook channel stopped", "page_id", ch.pageID, "name", ch.Name())
   156		return nil
   157	}
   158	
   159	// Send delivers an outbound message. Dispatches to comment reply or Messenger based on fb_mode metadata.
   160	func (ch *Channel) Send(ctx context.Context, msg bus.OutboundMessage) error {
   161		mode := msg.Metadata["fb_mode"]
   162	
   163		switch mode {
   164		case "messenger":
   165			text := FormatForMessenger(msg.Content)
   166			parts := splitMessage(text, messengerMaxChars)
   167			for _, part := range parts {
   168				if _, err := ch.graphClient.SendMessage(ctx, msg.ChatID, part); err != nil {
   169					ch.handleAPIError(err)
   170					return err
   171				}
   172			}
   173	
   174		default: // "comment"
   175			commentID := msg.Metadata["reply_to_comment_id"]
   176			if commentID == "" {
   177				return fmt.Errorf("facebook: reply_to_comment_id missing in outbound metadata")
   178			}
   179			text := FormatForComment(msg.Content)
   180			if _, err := ch.graphClient.ReplyToComment(ctx, commentID, text); err != nil {
   181				ch.handleAPIError(err)
   182				return err
   183			}
   184	
   185			// First inbox: send a private DM after comment reply (best-effort).
   186			if ch.config.Features.FirstInbox {
   187				senderID := msg.Metadata["sender_id"]
   188				if senderID != "" {
   189					ch.sendFirstInbox(ctx, senderID)
   190				}
   191			}
   192		}
   193	
   194		return nil
   195	}
   196	
   197	// WebhookHandler returns the shared webhook path and the global router as handler.
   198	// Only the first facebook instance mounts the route; others return ("", nil).
   199	func (ch *Channel) WebhookHandler() (string, http.Handler) {
   200		return globalRouter.webhookRoute()
   201	}
   202	
   203	// handleAPIError maps Graph API errors to channel health states.
   204	func (ch *Channel) handleAPIError(err error) {
   205		if err == nil {
   206			return
   207		}
   208		switch {
   209		case IsAuthError(err):
   210			ch.MarkFailed("token expired", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindAuth, false)
   211		case IsPermissionError(err):
   212			ch.MarkFailed("permission denied", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindAuth, false)
   213		case IsRateLimitError(err):
   214			ch.MarkDegraded("rate limited", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindNetwork, true)
   215		default:
   216			ch.MarkDegraded("api error", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindUnknown, true)
   217		}
   218	}
   219	
   220	// sendFirstInbox sends a one-time private DM after a comment reply (best-effort).
   221	func (ch *Channel) sendFirstInbox(ctx context.Context, senderID string) {
   222		if _, alreadySent := ch.firstInboxSent.LoadOrStore(senderID, struct{}{}); alreadySent {
   223			return
   224		}
   225		message := ch.config.FirstInboxMessage
   226		if message == "" {
   227			message = "Cảm ơn bạn đã comment! Mình có thể hỗ trợ thêm qua tin nhắn riêng."
   228		}
   229		if _, err := ch.graphClient.SendMessage(ctx, senderID, message); err != nil {
   230			slog.Warn("facebook: first inbox send failed", "sender_id", senderID, "err", err)
   231			ch.firstInboxSent.Delete(senderID) // allow retry on next comment
   232		}
   233	}
   234	
   235	// runDedupCleaner evicts dedup entries older than dedupTTL every dedupCleanEvery.
   236	func (ch *Channel) runDedupCleaner() {
   237		ticker := time.NewTicker(dedupCleanEvery)
   238		defer ticker.Stop()
   239		for {
   240			select {
   241			case <-ch.stopCh:
   242				return
   243			case <-ticker.C:
   244				now := time.Now()
   245				ch.dedup.Range(func(k, v any) bool {
   246					if t, ok := v.(time.Time); ok && now.Sub(t) > dedupTTL {
   247						ch.dedup.Delete(k)
   248					}
   249					return true
   250				})
   251			}
   252		}
   253	}
   254	
   255	// isDup checks and records a dedup key. Returns true if the key was already seen.
   256	func (ch *Channel) isDup(key string) bool {
   257		_, loaded := ch.dedup.LoadOrStore(key, time.Now())
   258		return loaded
   259	}

    30	// Channel implements channels.Channel and channels.WebhookChannel for Pancake (pages.fm).
    31	// One channel instance = one Pancake page, which may serve multiple platforms (FB, Zalo, IG, etc.)
    32	type Channel struct {
    33		*channels.BaseChannel

    58	// New creates a Pancake Channel from parsed credentials and config.
    59	func New(cfg pancakeInstanceConfig, creds pancakeCreds,
    60		msgBus *bus.MessageBus, _ store.PairingStore) (*Channel, error) {
    61	
    62		if creds.APIKey == "" {
    63			return nil, fmt.Errorf("pancake: api_key is required")
    64		}
    65		if creds.PageAccessToken == "" {
    66			return nil, fmt.Errorf("pancake: page_access_token is required")
    67		}
    68		if cfg.PageID == "" {

    70		}
    71	
    72		base := channels.NewBaseChannel(channels.TypePancake, msgBus, cfg.AllowFrom)
    73		stopCtx, stopFn := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
    74		apiClient := NewAPIClient(creds.APIKey, creds.PageAccessToken, cfg.PageID)
    75	
    76		ch := &Channel{
    77			BaseChannel:   base,
    78			config:        cfg,
    79			apiClient:     apiClient,
    80			pageID:        cfg.PageID,

    83			postFetcher:   NewPostFetcher(apiClient, cfg.PostContextCacheTTL),

    94	func Factory(name string, creds json.RawMessage, cfg json.RawMessage,

    97		var c pancakeCreds

   109		ch, err := New(ic, c, msgBus, pairingSvc)

   117	// Start connects the channel: verifies token, resolves platform, registers webhook.
   118	func (ch *Channel) Start(ctx context.Context) error {
   119		ch.MarkStarting("connecting to Pancake page")
   120	
   121		if err := ch.apiClient.VerifyToken(ctx); err != nil {
   122			ch.MarkFailed("token invalid", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindAuth, false)
   123			return err
   124		}
   125	
   126		// Resolve platform and page name from page metadata (best-effort — don't fail on this).
   127		if ch.platform == "" || ch.pageName == "" {
   128			if page, err := ch.apiClient.GetPage(ctx); err != nil {
   129				slog.Warn("pancake: could not resolve platform from page metadata", "page_id", ch.pageID, "err", err)
   130			} else {
   131				if page.Platform != "" {
   132					ch.platform = page.Platform
   133				}
   134				if page.Name != "" {
   135					ch.pageName = page.Name
   136				}
   137			}
   138		}
   139	
   140		if ch.webhookSecret == "" {

   144		}

   151		go ch.runDedupCleaner()

   161	func (ch *Channel) Stop(_ context.Context) error {
   162		globalRouter.unregister(ch.pageID)
   163		ch.stopFn()
   164		close(ch.stopCh)
   165		ch.SetRunning(false)
   166		ch.MarkStopped("stopped")
   167		slog.Info("pancake channel stopped", "page_id", ch.pageID, "name", ch.Name())
   168		return nil

   171	// Send delivers an outbound message via Pancake API.
   172	// Dispatches to reply_inbox or reply_comment based on pancake_mode metadata.
   173	func (ch *Channel) Send(ctx context.Context, msg bus.OutboundMessage) error {
   174		slog.Debug("pancake: Send called",
   175			"page_id", ch.pageID,
   176			"chat_id", msg.ChatID,
   177			"content_len", len(msg.Content),
   178			"platform", ch.platform,
   179			"channel_name", ch.Name())
   180	
   181		mode := msg.Metadata["pancake_mode"]
   182	
   183		switch mode {
   184		case "comment":
   185			return ch.sendCommentReply(ctx, msg)
   186		default:
   187			return ch.sendInboxReply(ctx, msg)
   188		}
   189	}

   191	// sendInboxReply delivers an outbound message as an inbox reply.
   192	func (ch *Channel) sendInboxReply(ctx context.Context, msg bus.OutboundMessage) error {
   193		conversationID := msg.ChatID
   194		if conversationID == "" {
   195			return fmt.Errorf("pancake: chat_id (conversation_id) is required for outbound message")
   196		}
   197	
   198		text := FormatOutbound(msg.Content, ch.platform)
   199	
   200		// Handle media attachments.
   201		attachmentIDs, err := ch.handleMediaAttachments(ctx, msg)
   202		if err != nil {
   203			slog.Warn("pancake: media upload failed, sending text only",
   204				"page_id", ch.pageID, "err", err)
   205		}
   206	
   207		// Pancake's official contract makes `message` and `content_ids` mutually exclusive.
   208		// Deliver uploaded media first, then follow with text chunks if needed.
   209		if len(attachmentIDs) > 0 {
   210			if err := ch.apiClient.SendAttachmentMessage(ctx, conversationID, attachmentIDs); err != nil {
   211				ch.handleAPIError(err)
   212				return err
   213			}
   214			if text == "" {
   215				return nil
   216			}
   217		}
   218	
   219		// Text-only: split into platform-appropriate chunks.
   220		// Store echo fingerprints BEFORE sending so that webhook echoes arriving
   221		// while the HTTP round-trip is in flight are already recognized as self-sent.
   222		parts := splitMessage(text, ch.maxMessageLength())
   223		for _, part := range parts {
   224			ch.rememberOutboundEcho(conversationID, part)
   225		}
   226		for _, part := range parts {
   227			if err := ch.apiClient.SendMessage(ctx, conversationID, part); err != nil {
   228				ch.handleAPIError(err)
   229				// Remove pre-stored echo fingerprints for unsent parts so they
   230				// don't suppress genuine customer messages that happen to match.
   231				ch.forgetOutboundEcho(conversationID, part)
   232				return err
   233			}
   234		}
   235		return nil
   236	}
   237	
   238	// sendCommentReply delivers an outbound message as a comment reply.
   239	func (ch *Channel) sendCommentReply(ctx context.Context, msg bus.OutboundMessage) error {
   240		commentID := msg.Metadata["comment_id"]
   241		if commentID == "" {
   242			return fmt.Errorf("pancake: comment_id missing in outbound metadata")
   243		}
   244	
   245		text := FormatOutbound(msg.Content, ch.platform)
   246	
   247		if err := ch.apiClient.ReplyComment(ctx, commentID, text); err != nil {
   248			ch.handleAPIError(err)
   249			return err
   250		}
   251	
   252		// First inbox: send a one-time DM to the commenter via private_reply.
   253		if ch.config.Features.FirstInbox {
   254			senderID := msg.Metadata["sender_id"]
   255			if senderID != "" {
   256				ch.sendFirstInbox(ctx, msg.ChatID, senderID)
   257			}
   258		}
   259	
   260		return nil
   261	}
   262	
   263	// sendFirstInbox sends a one-time private DM after a comment reply (best-effort).
   264	func (ch *Channel) sendFirstInbox(ctx context.Context, conversationID, senderID string) {
   265		if _, alreadySent := ch.firstInboxSent.LoadOrStore(senderID, struct{}{}); alreadySent {
   266			return
   267		}
   268		message := ch.config.FirstInboxMessage
   269		if message == "" {
   270			message = "Cảm ơn bạn đã comment! Mình có thể hỗ trợ thêm qua tin nhắn riêng."
   271		}
   272		if err := ch.apiClient.PrivateReply(ctx, conversationID, message); err != nil {
   273			slog.Warn("pancake: first inbox send failed", "sender_id", senderID, "err", err)
   274			ch.firstInboxSent.Delete(senderID) // allow retry on next comment
   275		}
   276	}

   279	func (ch *Channel) BlockReplyEnabled() *bool { return ch.config.BlockReply }

   286	
   287	// handleAPIError maps Pancake API errors to channel health states.
   288	func (ch *Channel) handleAPIError(err error) {
   289		if err == nil {
   290			return
   291		}
   292		switch {
   293		case isAuthError(err):
   294			ch.MarkFailed("token expired or invalid", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindAuth, false)
   295		case isRateLimitError(err):
   296			ch.MarkDegraded("rate limited", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindNetwork, true)
   297		default:
   298			ch.MarkDegraded("api error", err.Error(), channels.ChannelFailureKindUnknown, true)
   299		}
   300	}

   303	func (ch *Channel) maxMessageLength() int {
   304		switch ch.platform {

   312			return 4096
   313		case "line":
   314			return 5000
   315		default:
   316			return 2000
   317		}
   318	}

    20	// verifyHMAC verifies a Pancake HMAC-SHA256 signature.
    21	// Expected header format: "sha256=<hex-digest>"
    22	func verifyHMAC(body []byte, secret, signature string) bool {
    23		const prefix = "sha256="
    24		if len(signature) <= len(prefix) {
    25			return false
    26		}
    27		got, err := hex.DecodeString(signature[len(prefix):])
    28		if err != nil {
    29			return false
    30		}
    31		mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))
    32		mac.Write(body)
    33		expected := mac.Sum(nil)
    34		return hmac.Equal(got, expected)
    35	}

action.message:
## Summary of Changes

I implemented Pancake comment auto-reply and first-inbox DM support across 6 files (4 modified, 2 new):

### Modified Files

**1. `types.go`** — Expanded `pancakeInstanceConfig`:
- Added `FirstInbox` to `Features` struct
- Added `CommentReplyOptions` struct with `Filter` (all/keyword), `Keywords`, `IncludePostContext`
- Added `FirstInboxMessage` and `PostContextCacheTTL` config fields
- Added `PancakePost` and `PancakeComment` API response types

**2. `api_client.go`** — Added 4 new API methods:
- `ReplyComment()` — POST with `action: "reply_comment"` to reply to comments
- `PrivateReply()` — POST with `action: "private_reply"` for first-inbox DMs
- `ListPosts()` — GET posts list for the page
- `GetPost()` — Finds a specific post from the list (Pancake requires list-all vs per-post)

**3. `webhook_handler.go`** — Two changes:
- Replaced `if convType != "INBOX"` with a `switch convType` that routes `"COMMENT"` to a new `handleComment()` method, and returns 200 for other types
- Added `handleComment()` method on `webhookRouter` that resolves the target channel, builds normalized `MessagingData`, and dispatches to `target.handleCommentEvent()`

**4. `pancake.go`** — Three changes:
- Added `firstInboxSent` sync.Map and `postFetcher` fields to `Channel` struct
- Initialized `postFetcher` via `NewPostFetcher()` in `New()` constructor
- Refactored `Send()` to dispatch based on `pancake_mode` metadata:
  - `"comment"` → `sendCommentReply()` which calls `ReplyComment()` API + optional first-inbox DM
  - default → original `sendInboxReply()` (extracted from old `Send()` method)
- Added `sendFirstInbox()` with in-memory dedup and retry-on-failure

### New Files

**5. `comment_handler.go`** — `handleCommentEvent()` with:
- Feature gate (`features.comment_reply`)
- Self-reply guard (skip page's own comments)
- Message-level dedup
- Keyword filter (when `filter: "keyword"` with `keywords: [...]`)
- Optional post context enrichment via `buildCommentContent()`
- Publishes via `HandleMessage()` with `pancake_mode: "comment"` metadata

**6. `post_fetcher.go`** — `PostFetcher` with singleflight + TTL cache:
- singleflight key is `"posts"` (Pancake requires list-all-posts, not per-post API)
- TTL-based cache with configurable duration (default 15m)
- Fast path for cache hits, coalesces concurrent fetches

### Architecture matches the issue description:
```
Webhook POST (COMMENT event)
  → webhookRouter.ServeHTTP()
  → switch convType: INBOX|COMMENT
  → handleCommentEvent()
       |-> feature gate, self-reply, dedup, filter
       |-> buildCommentContent() [+ optional post context]
       |-> HandleMessage() → agent pipeline

Send(msg) with pancake_mode="comment"
  → ReplyComment() [action: reply_comment]
  → if first_inbox: sendFirstInbox() [action: private_reply]
```

All 31 existing tests pass, including with `-race` detector. No existing test behavior was changed — `TestWebhookRouterSkipsNonInboxConversationEvents` continues to pass because COMMENT events are still dropped when `comment_reply` is not enabled in config (feature gate).
